description: ITU / RF coordination precheck (placeholder). Research-grade snapshot; not legal advice.

rules.title: Frequency coordination / notification filing evidence for the RF payload
rules.authority: International Telecommunication Union (via the responsible national administration)
rules.source_reference: ITU Radio Regulations, Article 9 (coordination) and Article 11 (notification and recording)
rules.finding_if_fail: An RF transmitter is declared but no ITU/national frequency filing evidence is listed.
rules.limitations: Placeholder rule: ITU obligations run through the responsible national administration, and band-specific coordination requirements are NOT modelled. The Radio Regulations bind administrations, not operators directly. Requires review by the responsible administration / legal counsel.
